title: About Me
story: I am a Full Stack Developer focused on building practical software that solves operational problems clearly and reliably. My work spans responsive interfaces, backend APIs, database design, and deployment workflows.

Over the past few years, I have worked across backend engineering, product development, and self-driven experimentation. That path helped me move beyond isolated coding tasks and think more carefully about system design, user needs, and long-term maintainability.

More recently, I have been expanding into IoT and embedded systems through hands-on work with Arduino, ESP8266/ESP32, sensors, and device communication. My long-term direction is to build connected products where software and hardware work together in a useful, affordable, and dependable way.
highlights: Full stack developer with production experience in backend systems and SaaS workflows
Comfortable designing APIs, data models, and maintainable application structure
Hands-on builder with growing focus on IoT, embedded systems, and hardware integration
Strong problem-solving mindset shaped by real operational use cases, not only tutorials
Interested in practical products that improve everyday workflows through simple, reliable technology
